entries.name: Adapt
entries.desc: Gains resistance to the last element that hit this unit.

entries.name: Barrier
entries.desc: Absorbs magic damage only.

entries.name: Berserk
entries.desc: Damage +30%, but DR reduced by 5.

entries.name: Bleed
entries.desc: Takes physical damage each turn. Worse when moving.

entries.name: Blind
entries.desc: Accuracy reduced by 50%. Fishing/quickpress QTE harder.

entries.name: Burn
entries.desc: Takes fire damage each turn.

entries.name: Charm
entries.desc: Attacks own allies instead of enemies. Breaks if ally damages you.

entries.name: Clumsy
entries.desc: Agility reduced.

entries.name: Confuse
entries.desc: Actions target randomly (friend or foe).

entries.name: Corrode
entries.desc: Takes damage each turn. Reduces DR by 2 per stack.

entries.name: Counter Stance
entries.desc: Automatically counter-attacks when hit.

entries.name: Curse
entries.desc: Takes dark damage each turn. Cannot be healed.

entries.name: Doom
entries.desc: Dies when duration expires. Can be cleansed.

entries.name: Dull
entries.desc: Intelligence reduced.

entries.name: Exposed
entries.desc: All DR reduced by 5.

entries.name: Fear
entries.desc: Must move away from the source. Cannot attack the source.

entries.name: Focus
entries.desc: Next attack has +50% crit chance.

entries.name: Fragile
entries.desc: Endurance and DR reduced.

entries.name: Freeze
entries.desc: Cannot act or move. Takes 50% extra from Fire.

entries.name: Frostbite
entries.desc: Takes water damage each turn. Slows movement by 1.

entries.name: Haste
entries.desc: Movement +2, Agility +3.

entries.name: Immobilize
entries.desc: Cannot move. Same as Root but doesn't break.

entries.name: Link
entries.desc: Damage taken is split between linked units.

entries.name: Mark
entries.desc: Marked target takes bonus damage from the marker.

entries.name: Petrify
entries.desc: Cannot act or move. +10 Physical DR while petrified.

entries.name: Poison
entries.desc: Takes nature damage each turn. Stacks.

entries.name: Protect
entries.desc: Redirects attacks from adjacent allies to self.

entries.name: Regen
entries.desc: Heals HP each turn.

entries.name: Root
entries.desc: Cannot move. Can still attack and use skills.

entries.name: Shield
entries.desc: Absorbs damage before HP. Shield has its own HP pool that depletes.

entries.name: Shock
entries.desc: Takes lightning damage each turn. QTE difficulty +1.

entries.name: Silence
entries.desc: Cannot use skills (only basic attack/move/defend). Quiz QTE auto-fails.

entries.name: Sleep
entries.desc: Cannot act or move. BREAKS when taking damage.

entries.name: Slow
entries.desc: Movement reduced by 2.

entries.name: Stealth
entries.desc: Cannot be targeted. Breaks on attacking or taking AoE damage.

entries.name: Stun
entries.desc: Cannot act or move. Does NOT break on damage.

entries.name: Taunt
entries.desc: Must target the taunter with attacks.

entries.name: Transform
entries.desc: Changed into another form. Stats replaced temporarily.

entries.name: Unlucky
entries.desc: Luck reduced. Crit chance down.

entries.name: Weakness
entries.desc: Strength reduced.

entries.name: Web
entries.desc: Cannot move. Breaks on taking fire damage.
